summary: Completed e2e testing of iteration 7 features: task auto-assignment with authenticated owner_id, runtime remote-management informational payloads, routing policy defaults (paid allowed with approval), chat commercial fallback approval flow (409 → approve → 200 with live response), and UI verification. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for ChatPage (CommercialApprovalModal with anthropic-universal candidate) and RuntimesPage (Active Routing Policy display with Paid Providers: Allowed, Approval Required: Yes).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded admin and agents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified: (1) POST /api/tasks/ auto-assigns available agent and stores authenticated owner_id - PASS, (2) POST /runtimes/{id}/start and /runtimes/stop-all return informational non-blocking payloads (docker_unavailable) - PASS, (3) Routing policy defaults: never_use_paid_providers=false, require_approval_before_paid_escalation=true - PASS, (4) POST /api/chat/send without approval returns 409 approval_required with anthropic-universal candidate - PASS, (5) POST /api/chat/send with allow_commercial_fallback_once=true returns 200 with live model-backed response - PASS, (6) ChatPage CommercialApprovalModal renders correctly with candidate providers and approve/cancel buttons - PASS, (7) RuntimesPage shows Active Routing Policy with Paid Providers: Allowed and Approval Required: Yes - PASS. The anthropic-universal provider uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY from backend/.env for real live responses.

features_verified.task_auto_assignment_with_owner: PASS - Tasks auto-assign available agents and store authenticated user ID as owner_id
features_verified.runtime_remote_management: PASS - /runtimes/{id}/start and /runtimes/stop-all return 200 with informational payloads (docker_unavailable)
features_verified.chat_approval_required_409: PASS - Chat without approval returns 409 with approval_required=true and commercial_candidates=[anthropic-universal]
features_verified.chat_with_approval_200: PASS - Chat with allow_commercial_fallback_once=true returns 200 with live model response
features_verified.commercial_approval_modal_ui: PASS - Modal shows title, candidate providers (anthropic-universal), request preview, and approve/cancel buttons
features_verified.runtimes_page_policy_display: PASS - Shows Active Routing Policy section with Paid Providers, Default Runtime, and Approval Required fields
